verify.title: Verify your email
verify.instructions: We sent a verification code to
verify.successMessage: Your account has been verified. Redirecting to login...

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validation.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character

sessionExpired.title: Session Expired
sessionExpired.description: Your session has expired due to inactivity. Please log in again.

errors.rateLimited: Too many login attempts. Please try again in {minutes, plural, one {# minute} other {# minutes}}.
errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before logging in. Check your inbox for the verification link.
errors.serverError: Unable to connect to the server. Please try again.

upload.title: Upload Statement
upload.orClickToSelect: or click to select a file
upload.trustMessage: Your data stays encrypted and private
upload.errorInvalidFileType: Only CSV and PDF files are supported.
upload.errorFileTooLarge: This file is too large. Please upload files under 10MB.
upload.errorRateLimited: You've uploaded a lot of files recently. Please try again in a few minutes.
upload.errorUploadFailed: Something went wrong with the upload. Please try again.
upload.errorInvalidFileStructure: This file doesn't look like a bank statement.
upload.errorUnsupportedBankFormat: We couldn't recognize this bank statement format.
upload.errorEncodingError: We had trouble reading this file.
upload.errorEmptyFile: This file appears to be empty.
upload.errorCorruptedFile: This file appears to be damaged.
upload.errorUnauthenticated: Please log in to upload files.
upload.suggestionExportCsv: Try exporting your bank statement as CSV.
upload.suggestionCheckCsv: Check that the file is a .csv with transaction data
upload.suggestionReExport: Try re-exporting from your bank app
upload.suggestionReExportFile: Try re-exporting the file from your bank
upload.suggestionNotCorrupted: Make sure the file isn't corrupted
upload.suggestionOtherBanksSoon: Other banks will be supported soon
upload.suggestionCheckTransactionData: Check that your bank statement has transaction data
upload.suggestionDownloadFromBank: Try downloading the statement again from your bank
upload.suggestionWaitAndRetry: Please try again in a few minutes.
